name: The Phoenician Empire: Traders Who Changed Civilization — Fexingo History

episodes.title: Carthage's Sacred Prostitution: The Cult of Astarte
episodes.description:
In this episode, Lucas and Luna explore the controversial and often misunderstood practice of sacred prostitution in Carthage and the wider Phoenician world. They delve into the cult of Astarte, the Phoenician goddess of love, fertility, and war, and discuss how her worship intersected with daily life in Carthage, Sidon, and Tyre. Listeners will learn about the temple of Astarte at Kition in Cyprus, the role of priestesses known as 'hierodules,' and the debate among modern scholars over whether the ancient accounts of sacred sex rites are accurate or slanderous propaganda from hostile Greek and Roman sources. The episode also touches on the connections between Astarte and other Near Eastern goddesses like Ishtar and Aphrodite, and examines archaeological evidence from Carthage that sheds light on the practice. Lucas and Luna unpack the tensions between historical fact and cultural bias, offering a nuanced look at one of the most sensationalized aspects of Carthaginian religion.
